1. For Preliminary Distribution 2. For Order Determining Entitlement To Distribution 3.For Order Approving Creditors' Claims To Distribution And Attorney For Executor.
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Ed Ottonello appearing for petitioner James Wilson. Court is satified with the 10% residue going to the named residuary beneficaries. Court instructed counsel to revise the order to separate the the 30% residue bequest to Thomas and his wife Barbara, half to each person.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Reporter: Patrick Heard CSR# 11055. Bailiff: O. Arias.
